0.$description: Used when elements require sharp edges with no rounding

2.$description: Minimal rounding used for subtle UI edges

4.$description: Small rounding used in compact interface elements

6.$description: Slightly softer rounding for small components

8.$description: Default rounding used for most interactive components

12.$description: Used for cards and medium containers

16.$description: Applied to modals and large surfaces

full.$description: Creates fully rounded shapes such as pills and avatars

1.$description: Ultra-thin borders for dividers and separators

2.$description: Default border thickness for inputs and cards

4.$description: Default border thickness for inputs and cards

dashed.$description: Used for placeholders, drag areas or editable zones

dotted.$description: Used for placeholders, drag areas or editable zones
